discovery_sources.text: TrumpRx offers 43 brand name drugs at discounted prices through manufacturer coupons and GoodRx integration - verify scope and accuracy of drug list

discovery_sources.text: TrumpRx prices are often similar to or higher than existing discount services like GoodRx and SingleCare - verify comparative pricing accuracy
